text.title: Selling Ideas Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Author opens with 'we built X' before audience has felt pain; audience tunes out.
antipattern.fix: Force SPIN order; never present need_payoff before situation+problem+implication.

antipattern.symptom: Pitch wins on rapport but loses to a Challenger competitor with insight.
antipattern.fix: Add a teach-tailor-take-control line backed by data.

antipattern.symptom: Audience objects on price; author launches 5-bullet counter; conversation closes.
antipattern.fix: Force LAER on every objection; Explore before Respond.

antipattern.symptom: Pitch ends 'happy to chat more'; no follow-up; deal dies in pipeline.
antipattern.fix: Require concrete next-step + date; reject artefact without.
